chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1102 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.5680/2025 3.For hearing of main case. 22.04.2025 None present for the Petitioner. Mr.Muhammad Amir Khan, Advocate for Respondent No.7. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. On the last date following order was passed:- “15.04.2025 Mr.Ismail Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Muhammad Amir Khan, Advocate for Respondent No.7. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Comments filed by learned counsel for respondent No.7 is taken on record and copy of the same has been supplied to petitioner’s counsel. It is demonstrated from page 45 of the said comments that in view of the complaints having been received regarding operation of Bachat Bazars causing inconvenience, misery and nuisance to general public, therefore, several NOCs including that issued earlier to the petitioner had been cancelled. Learned counsel for the petitioner may take instructions. To come up on 22.04.2025.” Today, the petitioner remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Nasir
